details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected both reports/audit/ and reports/board/ at top level.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing — governance contract structure incomplete. memory_bank/, .cursor/automations/ (with README + specs), and reports/audit/ are present.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot. scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py references Moltbot. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot. These are code/config paths, not audit/docs documenting removal.
